prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次约 9008→8382→7486→7841→7345，整体呈前移趋势（更难进），近 4 年累计前移约 1663 名；2025 年基准约 7345 名，较 2024 年前移约 496 名，降幅明显；本省物理类计划 2021–2025 年分别为 92→95→95→100→102 人，逐年小幅扩招；2026 年计划 104 人，较 2025 年再扩招 2 人（+2.0%），扩招对竞争略有缓解，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名近年持续上升：2021 年第 62→2022 年第 64→2023 年第 64→2024 年第 68→2025 年第 63→2026 年第 57，2026 年排名创近年新高，表明学校综合实力与声誉稳步提升，对考生吸引力增强；2024 年声誉评价为中性/混合（涉及教师师德事件，但学校已依法依规处理）；抖音热度总排名第 7（高热），短视频曝光量远超同类 211 高校，反映报考关注度持续升温；未见投档断档记录，报考心理稳定；化学工程与技术 A、化学 A-、材料科学与工程 A-，共 3 个 A- 及以上学科，化工为传统王牌，材料、化学实力突出，与该校工科试验班（先进材料、绿色化工等）招生专业高度对应，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度高热推荐，与该校计算机类、自动化类等招生专业匹配，推高相关专业组竞争；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 16.7 万，较 2025 年（约 17.2 万）减少约 2.9%，竞争略有缓解；该校位于北京，对黑龙江考生有较强地域吸引力；2025 年该校在黑龙江招生 13 人（占全国 598 人的 2.17%），占比稳定，无明显地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026 年软科排名上升至第 57 位、抖音高热关注度、小幅扩招（+2 人）及本省考生略减等因素，预计 2026 年物理类竞争较 2025 年略有加剧，位次继续前移。预测最低位次约 7401 名，区间 6901–7901 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 9008→8382→7486→7841→7345, showing an overall forward trend (harder to enter), with a cumulative forward shift of about 1663 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 7345, a forward shift of about 496 places compared to 2024, a significant decrease; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 92→95→95→100→102 people, with a gradual small expansion; the 2026 plan is 104 people, an additional expansion of 2 people (+2.0%) compared to 2025, which slightly alleviates competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has been rising in recent years: 2021 62nd→2022 64th→2023 64th→2024 68th→2025 63rd→2026 57th, with the 2026 ranking reaching a new high in recent years, indicating a steady improvement in the school's comprehensive strength and reputation, enhancing its appeal to candidates; the 2024 reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed (involving teacher ethics incidents, but the school has handled them according to laws and regulations); Douyin popularity total ranking 7th (high heat), with short video exposure far exceeding similar 211 universities, reflecting continuously rising application attention; no record of enrollment gaps, stable application psychology; Chemical Engineering and Technology A, Chemistry A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, a total of 3 A- and above disciplines, with chemical engineering as the traditional trump card, materials and chemistry outstanding, highly corresponding to the school's engineering experimental classes (advanced materials, green chemical engineering, etc.) enrollment majors, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended in social heat, matching the school's Computer Science, Automation and other enrollment majors, pushing up competition in related major groups; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in the province in 2026 is about 167,000, a decrease of about 2.9% compared to 2025 (about 172,000), slightly alleviating competition; the school is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Heilongjiang candidates; in 2025, the school enrolled 13 people in Heilongjiang (accounting for 2.17% of the national total of 598), with a stable proportion and no obvious regional preference changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the rise of the Soft Science ranking to 57th in 2026, high Douyin attention, small expansion (+2 people), and a slight decrease in provincial candidates, it is expected that competition in the Physics Category in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with rankings continuing to move forward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 7401, with a range of 6901–7901.

- Computer Science (Electronic Information Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science and Technology)
- Automation (Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments)
- Materials Science and Engineering (Materials, Big Data Dual Degree).

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Science Experimental Class (Green Chemistry).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 6901–7901, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is better than 6901, you can focus on impacting Tier 1 top majors such as Hongde Academy and Computer Science; if your ranking is around 7400, mainly consider Tier 2 majors like Outstanding Engineer, High-End Equipment, and Chemical Engineering Dual Degree; if your ranking is close to 7901, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年历史类（含文科）最低位次约 1515→1517→1580→1582→1497，整体波动极小，近 5 年最大波幅仅 85 名；2025 年基准约 1497 名，较 2024 年前移约 85 名；本省历史类计划 2021–2025 年分别为 15→13→13→13→11 人，呈小幅缩减趋势；2026 年计划 11 人，与 2025 年持平，计划稳定。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名近年持续上升：2021 年第 62→2022 年第 64→2023 年第 64→2024 年第 68→2025 年第 63→2026 年第 57，2026 年排名创近年新高，学校综合实力提升对文科考生也有一定吸引力；2024 年声誉评价为中性/混合；抖音热度总排名第 7（高热），短视频曝光量高，反映整体报考关注度升温；未见投档断档记录；化学工程与技术 A、化学 A-、材料科学与工程 A-，虽为理工类学科，但该校法学（卓越实验班）为文科考生提供优质法学教育，工商管理类覆盖经管法多方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学社会热度偏热（推荐），工商管理 类分化观望，汉语言/中文推荐；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 16.7 万，历史类按近年占比约 31.7% 估算约 5.3 万人，较 2025 年（约 5.5 万）减少约 3.2%，竞争略有缓解；该校位于北京，对黑龙江文科考生有较强地域吸引力；2025 年该校在黑龙江招生 13 人（占全国 598 人的 2.17%），占比稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次高度稳定、2026 年招生计划持平、软科排名上升、抖音高热关注度及本省历史类考生略减等因素，预计 2026 年历史类竞争与 2025 年基本持平，位次小幅波动。预测最低位次约 1517 名，区间 1244–1790 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 1515→1517→1580→1582→1497, with very small overall fluctuation, the maximum range over the past 5 years being only 85 places; the 2025 baseline is about 1497, moving forward about 85 places compared to 2024; the provincial History Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 15→13→13→13→11, showing a slight decreasing trend; the 2026 plan is 11, unchanged from 2025, indicating a stable plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has been rising in recent years: 2021 62nd→2022 64th→2023 64th→2024 68th→2025 63rd→2026 57th, the 2026 ranking reaching a new high in recent years, the improvement in comprehensive strength also attracts liberal arts candidates; the 2024 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed; Douyin heat total ranking 7th (high heat), short video exposure high, reflecting increased overall application attention; no record of gaps in admission; Chemical Engineering and Technology A, Chemistry A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, although these are science and engineering disciplines, the university's Law (Excellent Experimental Class) provides high-quality legal education for liberal arts candidates, and the Business Administration category covers multiple directions in economics, management, and law.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law social heat is slightly hot (recommended), Business Administration category is divided and wait-and-see, Chinese Language/Literature recommended; the province's total number of general college entrance examination candidates in 2026 is about 167,000, with History Category estimated at about 53,000 based on the recent proportion of about 31.7%, a decrease of about 3.2% compared to 2025 (about 55,000), slightly easing competition; the university is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for liberal arts candidates from Heilongjiang; in 2025, the university enrolled 13 students in Heilongjiang (accounting for 2.17% of the national total of 598), a stable proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the high stability of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the rising Soft Science ranking, the high Douyin heat attention, and the slight decrease in the number of History Category candidates in the province, it is expected that competition in the History Category in 2026 will be basically the same as in 2025, with small fluctuations in ranking. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1517, with a range of 1244–1790.
